auth.name: Full name
auth.resetPasswordHint: We'll email you a link to reset your password.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Start understanding your money in minutes.
auth.loginSubtitle: Welcome back. Let's check your finances.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.name: Budget name
budgets.noBudgets: No budgets yet. Create one to start tracking your spending.

goals.title: Goals
goals.name: Goal name
goals.noGoals: No goals yet. Set one to start saving with purpose.
goals.simulatorHint: Adjust your monthly contribution or target date to see the impact.

receipts.title: Receipts
receipts.subtitle: Snap or upload a receipt and let AI extract the details.
receipts.mockNotice: Receipt scanning runs in mock mode unless an OpenAI API key is configured — extracted values are simulated for demo purposes.
receipts.emptyHint: Upload a photo of a receipt to get started.

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Track upcoming bills, loans, subscriptions, and reminders.
calendar.empty: Nothing due. You're all caught up!

recurring.title: Recurring Transactions
recurring.subtitle: Automate bills, subscriptions, and regular income so you never miss a beat.
recurring.name: Name
recurring.autoCreateHint: Automatically log a transaction each time this is due.
recurring.emptyHint: Add subscriptions, bills, or income that repeat on a schedule.
recurring.deleteDescription: This will stop future occurrences. Past transactions stay in your history.

wrapped.title: Monthly Wrapped
wrapped.subtitle: Your money, month by month — a shareable recap of how it went.
wrapped.empty: No transactions recorded for this month yet — log a few to unlock your wrapped.

family.title: Family
family.subtitle: Share wallets and track money together with your family.
family.emptyHint: Create a family group to share wallets and track spending together.
family.inviteHint: The person must already have a MoneyFlow AI account with this email.
family.removeConfirm: Remove this person from your family group?
family.sharedWalletsHint: Turn on sharing so family members can see and use these wallets.
family.noWallets: You don't have any wallets yet.
family.deleteGroupHint: This removes all members and unshares all wallets.
family.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete this family group? This can't be undone.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Manage feature flags and view platform-wide stats.
admin.accessDeniedHint: You need an admin account to view this page.
admin.label: Label

settings.title: Settings
settings.unlockAiFeatures: Pro and Family plans unlock AI insights, forecasts, monthly wrapped and more — billing is simulated for this demo.

chat.title: AI Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask anything about your money — powered by AI.
chat.emptyState: Ask me about your spending, budgets, goals, or how to save more.
chat.suggestion1: How much did I spend this month?
chat.suggestion2: Am I on track with my budgets?
chat.suggestion3: How can I save more each month?

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: AI-powered insights into your financial habits.
insights.noInsights: No insights yet. Generate some to see how you're doing.
insights.noScore: No health score yet. Compute one to see how you're doing.

forecast.title: Cashflow Forecast
forecast.subtitle: Projected income, expenses, and balance for the months ahead.

salary.title: Salary Allocation Planner
salary.subtitle: Plan how to split your monthly income across savings, investments, bills, and spending.
salary.enterSalary: Enter your monthly salary to see the breakdown.

emergency.title: Emergency Financial Mode
emergency.subtitle: A survival plan for when money gets tight.
emergency.intro: Activate emergency mode to get a survival budget, cash runway estimate, and a plan to cut costs fast.
emergency.cashRunwayHint: How long your current balance covers essential expenses.
emergency.noBudgetData: Not enough spending data to build a survival budget yet.
